data.body:
11:39-40 PM

“Iceberg, Right Ahead!” - Frederick Fleet (1/5)
data.author: did:plc:hbepqrxcvezmxgzzxpbjqwge

data.body: Fleet spots the iceberg, rings the warning bell three times, and telephones Sixth Officer Moody, who calmly relays the three words to Murdoch. Murdoch, who can see the iceberg, orders ‘Hard a starboard’ as he runs in from the Bridge Wing. (2/5)
data.author: did:plc:hbepqrxcvezmxgzzxpbjqwge

data.body: Quartermaster Hitchens is at the wheel and turns! Murdoch telegraphs the Engine Room ‘stop!’ This has all taken 30 seconds. Titanic turns and the iceberg passes on starboard. (3/5)
data.author: did:plc:hbepqrxcvezmxgzzxpbjqwge

data.body: Murdoch and everyone else onboard feel the impact as the iceberg scrapes Titanic’s hull. A second order, ‘Hard a port!’ is given. This keeps the propellers from hitting the iceberg, possibly the single most consequential decision of a minute filled with them. (4/5)
data.author: did:plc:hbepqrxcvezmxgzzxpbjqwge

data.body: Murdoch closes the watertight doors, unaware of just how much damage Titanic has taken. The men working down below were all too aware. Boiler Room 6 already had two feet of water. (5/5)
data.author: did:plc:hbepqrxcvezmxgzzxpbjqwge

data.body:
I know why I don't jive with Pokemon Champions. Or most of modern Pokemon at all anymore. 
It's because I play for the World. For the Map and the light story that comes with it. I do stupid ego stroking roleplay in my head about my trainer and their team breaking into Team Rocket Strongholds.
data.author: did:plc:s6t4qrpvvhknznaplnicgs3d

data.body:
The team composition helps weave this roleplay. Busting down doors with a thunderstorm or an explosion of fire. 

But champions is just. Battles. 
The modern games haven't left much room for make believe as there's real cutscenes.
data.author: did:plc:s6t4qrpvvhknznaplnicgs3d

data.body: I like the ability of filling in the gaps that we don't get anymore. The simplicity of the graphics on the DS and prior give you a lot to work with. But now things are kind of bland. SV was good because scenes were few and far between I guess. But I miss the old games.
data.author: did:plc:s6t4qrpvvhknznaplnicgs3d
